parsed.production_notes: The top half is standard human-recorded video with natural movement and lighting. The bottom half features an AI-generated character with metallic skin, slightly stiff lip-syncing, and a perfectly static, stylized background typical of AI generation.

characters.appearance: Young adult Indian woman with a medium build and fair complexion. She has long, straight black hair parted in the middle. Her facial features are soft and natural.
characters.wardrobe: Wearing a white dupatta draped over a red top.
characters.demeanor: Curious, attentive, and eager to learn.

characters.appearance: Humanoid female robot with smooth, metallic silver skin and visible robotic joints/panel lines. She has dark hair styled in an updo, a red bindi, and realistic human-like eyes and lips.
characters.wardrobe: Wearing a traditional red sari with intricate gold patterns and borders.

scenes.setting: Top: Plain white wall. Bottom: Elegant room with arched windows, plants, and a sofa.

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium close-up shot features Character A, a young Indian woman. She has long, straight dark hair and a fair complexion. She is wearing a white dupatta elegantly draped over a red top. The background is a simple, unadorned light-colored wall, keeping the focus entirely on her. The lighting is soft, even, and natural, creating a realistic and relatable appearance. She maintains a calm and attentive expression, looking directly forward. Her posture is relaxed yet engaged.

A medium close-up shot displays Character B, a humanoid female robot. She possesses smooth, metallic silver skin with visible panel lines, contrasting with her realistic dark hair styled in an elegant updo. A traditional red bindi adorns her forehead, and she is dressed in a rich red sari with intricate gold borders. She sits comfortably on a beige sofa accented with patterned throw pillows. The background reveals a sophisticated interior with large arched windows letting in soft daylight. Potted green plants add a touch of nature to the modern, elegant setting. Her expression is friendly and welcoming.

scenes.visual_description: The video utilizes a persistent horizontal split-screen layout throughout the scene. The top panel displays a human woman in a simple, brightly lit setting, acting as the user. The bottom panel features an AI-generated robotic woman in a traditional sari, situated in a stylized, elegant living room. Dynamic text overlays appear in both panels, displaying the spoken dialogue in Hindi and English with varying colors to highlight specific words. The characters maintain eye contact with the camera, simulating a direct video call or interactive tutoring session. The overall composition contrasts the everyday reality of the user with the polished, futuristic aesthetic of the AI tutor.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: मुझे अपने पति को एनिवर्सरी विश करना है। [I want to wish my husband for our anniversary.]

Character B says: हां, आप हिंदी में बोलो, मैं इंग्लिश में प्रैक्टिस करवाती हूं। [Yes, you speak in Hindi, I will make you practice in English.]

Character A says: आपके लिए 10th एनिवर्सरी। [For you, 10th anniversary.]

Character B says: Happy 10th wedding anniversary to you. [Happy 10th wedding anniversary to you.]

Character A says: मैं और बच्चे आपसे बहुत प्यार करते हैं। [The kids and I love you very much.]

Character B says: Me and the kids love you very much. [Me and the kids love you very much.]

Character A says: मैं चाहती हूं आपको जिंदगी में सब कुछ मिले। [I want you to get everything in life.]

Character B says: I wish you get everything you want in life. [I wish you get everything you want in life.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
मुझे अपने पति को एनिवर्सरी विश करना है (I want to wish my husband for our anniversary)
हा आप हिन्दी बोलो मैं इंग्लिश में प्रैक्टिस करवाती हूं (Yes, you speak in Hindi, I will make you practice in English)
आपके लिए 10th एनिवर्सरी (For you, 10th anniversary)
HAPPY 10TH WEDDING ANNIVERSARY TO YOU
मैं और बच्चे आपसे बहुत प्यार करते हैं (The kids and I love you very much)
ME AND the kids LOVE YOU VERY MUCH
मैं चाहती हूं आपको जिंदगी में सब कुछ मिले (I want you to get everything in life)
I WISH YOU GET EVERYTHING YOU WANT IN LIFE

scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: अरे ये तो बहुत आसान है। [Oh, this is very easy.]

Character B says: हां, इंग्लिश सीखना आसान ही है, बस तुम ऐसे प्रैक्टिस करते रहना और दो हफ्ते में तुम्हारी इंग्लिश फर्स्ट क्लास हो जाएगी। [Yes, learning English is easy, just keep practicing like this and in two weeks your English will be first class.]

Character A says: ये मैं कहां से कर सकती हूं? [Where can I do this from?]

Character B says: तुम्हें बस SpeakX ऐप डाउनलोड करना है। इसमें मेरे जैसे एआई इंग्लिश टीचर तुम्हें बिना जजमेंट के इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस कराएंगे। और तुम्हारी इंग्लिश फर्राटेदार हो जाएगी। जल्दी SpeakX डाउनलोड करो और दो हफ्ते में अपने इंग्लिश से सबको इंप्रेस करो। [You just have to download the SpeakX app. In this, AI English teachers like me will make you practice English without judgment. And your English will become fluent. Download SpeakX quickly and impress everyone with your English in two weeks.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
अरे ये तो बहुत आसान है (Oh, this is very easy)
हां, इंग्लिश सीखना आसान ही है, बस तुम ऐसे प्रैक्टिस करते रहना और दो हफ्ते में तुम्हारी इंग्लिश फर्स्ट क्लास हो जाएगी (Yes, learning English is easy, just keep practicing like this and in two weeks your English will be first class)
ये मैं कहां से कर सकती हूं? (Where can I do this from?)
तुम्हें बस SPEAK X ऐप डाउनलोड करना है। इसमें मेरे जैसे एआई इंग्लिश टीचर तुम्हें बिना जजमेंट के इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस कराएंगे। और तुम्हारी इंग्लिश फर्राटेदार हो जाएगी। जल्दी SPEAK X डाउनलोड करो और दो हफ्ते में अपने इंग्लिश से सबको इंप्रेस करो। (You just have to download the SPEAK X app. In this, AI English teachers like me will make you practice English without judgment. And your English will become fluent. Download SPEAK X quickly and impress everyone with your English in two weeks.)
